title: uragoga eriantha
intro: Uragoga eriantha, also known as the "Indian snakeroot," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its use as a stimulant, antispasmodic, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Uragoga eriantha include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural remedy for fever and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
